title: orchis incarnata f. lanceata
intro: Orchis incarnata f. lanceata, also known as the lady's orchid or pink lady's slipper, is a terrestrial orchid plant species that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its ability to treat kidney and urinary tract issues, due to its diuretic and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Orchis incarnata f. lanceata have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and acting as a natural remedy for fever and digestive problems. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's root and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
